title: Wire shared cite-line parser into cc/codex/cursor hook templates (replace inline regex)
description: Replace existing inline cite-line regex parsing in fabric-hint.cjs with calls to the shared parseCiteLine module. Since node_modules is unavailable at hook runtime, the shared module must be inline-bundled at install time (or embedded as a string template). Output cite_commitments structured field on assistant_turn_observed events.

files.target: parseKbLine function (extract current regex location via grep parseKbLine) + appendAssistantTurnEvent payload construction
files.change: Replace parseKbLine body with call to inlined parseCiteLine. Inline the shared parser via build-time transformation (see install pipeline note below). Update event payload to include cite_commitments field populated from parser output.

Add build step: read packages/shared/src/cite-line-parser.ts, transpile to CJS string (use existing build infra or inline TypeScript-to-JS via tsc API), inject as `const { parseCiteLine } = (function() { /* inlined module */ return module.exports; })();` at top of generated hook script. Cache transpiled output to avoid per-install cost.

files.target: existing parseKbLine tests + add cite_commitments coverage
files.change: Update existing test expectations to include cite_commitments field in parsed output. Add 5 new cases covering contract syntax variants from TASK-03 test corpus.

implementation: Read packages/cli/templates/hooks/fabric-hint.cjs in full to map current parseKbLine location and event payload assembly.

Determine inline-bundle strategy: option A (string-template approach — write parser source as a string literal in install.ts, inject into hook), option B (esbuild bundle-once at install — preferred if esbuild is already a dep).
Check packages/cli/package.json for existing transpile/bundle deps; choose option matching existing infra.
Modify install pipeline to inject the inlined parser at the top of fabric-hint.cjs during rendering.
Update parseKbLine call sites in hook to use inlined parseCiteLine; remove dead regex code.
Update appendAssistantTurnEvent (or equivalent) to populate cite_commitments field on the event.
Update fabric-hint-cite.test.ts: existing tests assert new cite_commitments shape; add 5 new contract-syntax cases.
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test fabric-hint-cite` to confirm green.
Manually verify install: `node packages/cli/dist/cli.mjs install --dry-run` (or equivalent) shows fabric-hint.cjs with inlined parser at the top.

reference.pattern: Hook template inline-bundle (new pattern in this repo)
reference.examples: No prior precedent for hook-time shared module import. TASK-04 establishes the inline-bundle pipeline.

rationale.chosen_approach: Inline-bundle shared parser into hook template at install time. Hook is self-contained zero-dep CJS at runtime.
alternatives_considered: Vendor parser as embedded string and eval (rejected: eval safety + sourcemap loss)
Skip shared lib, leave inline regex (rejected: defeats TASK-03 drift mitigation)
Use Node 22 native TypeScript stripping (rejected: not portable across user Node versions)
rationale.tradeoffs: Install becomes marginally slower (transpile parser); cached after first install.

manual_checks: Manually trigger Stop hook on test transcript with contract syntax → verify cite_commitments populated in events.jsonl
Run fab install on a clean test project → verify fabric-hint.cjs contains inlined parser
success_metrics: fabric-hint-cite.test adds 5 new cases all passing
Existing tests updated to assert cite_commitments field
Install pipeline emits hook with inlined parser (file size grows by ~3-4KB)
integration: install-skills-and-hooks.test: rendered fabric-hint.cjs contains parseCiteLine inlined

criteria: fabric-hint.cjs no longer contains old inline cite regex (grep for parseKbLine returns only the new inlined-parser invocation site)
Install pipeline includes inline-bundle step (grep for 'cite-line-parser' or 'parseCiteLine' in skills-and-hooks.ts)
fabric-hint-cite.test.ts adds 5 new test cases (grep test names)
Generated hook script (after install) contains string 'parseCiteLine'
events.jsonl assistant_turn_observed events written by new hook contain cite_commitments field
Commit msg: 'feat(rc24): wire shared parser into hook templates with inline-bundle (TASK-04)'
